proof:
have hderiv : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun t => -2 * cos (t / 2 + 3)) (sin (x / 2 + 3)) x := by
    intro x _
    have h1 := ((hasDerivAt_id x).div_const 2).add_const 3
    have h2 := (hasDerivAt_cos (x / 2 + 3)).comp x h1
    convert h2.const_mul (-2) using 1
    ring
  have hint : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => sin (x / 2 + 3)) volume a b := by
    apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt hderiv hint]
  ring
